name: Does my employer's small size (under 5 employees) mean no workers comp?
description: No. Utah/Idaho REQUIRE coverage for ALL employers. Uninsured = state fund pays your claim.

mainEntity.name: Does my employer's small size (under 5 employees) mean no workers comp?

acceptedAnswer.text: No. Utah/Idaho REQUIRE coverage for ALL employers. Uninsured = state fund pays your claim.
